task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ImageJ image window titled 'Mitosis'. It should initially have sliders for Z, Time, and Channel.

task_completion.description: Create a Maximum Intensity Projection preserving time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new image window titled 'MAX_Mitosis' or similar. It should have a Time slider (1-51) but no Z slider, indicating the Z-dimension was collapsed while preserving the time series.

task_completion.description: Select or isolate the Red channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the Red channel (Microtubules) is being analyzed. The image might appear red, the 'Channels Tool' might show Red selected, or the window title might indicate channel 1/Red.
Look for the 'ROI Manager' window containing at least 3 items in its list, and multiple selection outlines (like circles or polygons) drawn on the cells in the image.

task_completion.description: Generate intensity traces across all 51 time frames
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Results' table window showing intensity values (e.g., Mean) with rows corresponding to 51 time frames for the identified ROIs, typically generated via the 'Multi Measure' function in the ROI Manager.

task_completion.description: Save the measurement results and ROI set
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Save' dialog boxes, a file manager window, or terminal commands showing the files 'time_series_traces.csv' and 'cell_rois.zip' being saved to the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with ImageJ menus, ROI tools, and the ROI Manager, rather than just writing a Python/macro script in a text editor to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: ROIs are genuinely drawn on the image
integrity.visual_evidence: The ROIs in the ROI Manager should correspond to actual shapes drawn on the image cells, not just an empty list or randomly generated coordinates without visual confirmation.

integrity.description: Results table contains actual measured data
integrity.visual_evidence: The Results table should contain actual numerical data that varies over time, reflecting real image measurements, rather than static, mocked, or copy-pasted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the 'Mitosis (26MB, 5D stack)' sample. It contains exactly 51 time frames. The agent must create a Maximum Intensity Projection (collapsing Z, keeping Time). At least 3 ROIs must be identified. Outputs must be saved to '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/time_series_traces.csv' and '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/cell_rois.zip'.
